calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 525
April 6, 2005
Judge Pro Tem Charlene P. Rosack
Clerk Jose Rios Merida
Not Reported.

APPEARANCES:
Raymond Choy, plaintiff/respondent
Hardin Smith, defendant/appellant
Aaron Henry Brooks, witness for the defendant/appellant

Action called for Small Claims Trial De Novo on Appeal. Court and parties are present as noted above. Stipulation to Pro Tem Judge Signed. Parties and witnesses sworn, testify. Defendant/appellant exhibit A (letters, documents) marked and admitted. Plaintiff/respondent's exhibits 1, 2, 3, 4, & 5 (letters, documents) marked and admitted. Case argued and submitted.

-----------------------------------------

Later, outside the parties' presence: Judgment is entered in favor of plaintiff/respondent in the amount of $1950.00 (principal) and $172.00 (costs.) Judgment signed, filed and copies mailed to parties. Appeal exhibits (only) returned by mail. Certificate of mailing by clerk.
